title: Remove a Robot Using the Robot Selection Screen
summary: Use the Robot Selection Add and Remove screen to remove a robot by entering the corresponding robot ID or selecting the robot, then confirm the system reports that removal was successful.
when_to_use: Use when performing a robot removal action from the Robot Selection Add and Remove interface.
not_for: Do not use for robot restart actions.
Do not use for robot add actions.
Do not use when recovery beyond the success confirmation is required, because the source does not provide additional troubleshooting or recovery steps.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the remove action in the Robot Selection Add and Remove screen and verify the system shows removal was successful.

safety_notes: This source describes a basic HMI action only.
If the system does not show that the removal was successful, stop and escalate because the source does not provide additional recovery steps.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Robot Selection Add and Remove screen
Corresponding robot ID or ability to select the robot in the interface

access_required: Access to the Robot Selection Add and Remove screen
system_preconditions: The Robot Selection Add and Remove screen is open or available.
The operator has the corresponding robot ID or can identify the robot in the selection interface.

visual_references.description: Training slide titled Robot Selection Add and Remove showing the remove workflow, robot ID entry/selection, Remove button, and success confirmation concept.

steps.title: Open the Robot Selection Add and Remove screen
steps.purpose: Navigate to the interface where the remove action is performed.
steps.instruction: Open or locate the "Robot Selection Add and Remove" screen.
steps.expected_result: The Robot Selection Add and Remove interface is visible and available for use.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen titled "Robot Selection Add and Remove" is displayed with the remove area available.
steps.failure_condition: The Robot Selection Add and Remove screen cannot be located or is not available.

actions.label: Open Robot Selection screen
actions.exact_action: Open or locate the "Robot Selection Add and Remove" screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The slide titled "Robot Selection Add and Remove," including the Remove Robot section and the overall interface layout.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the Robot Selection Add and Remove screen is not available.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide title appears as "Robot Selection Add and Remove" with sections for Add Robot and Remove Robot.

steps.title: Identify the robot to remove
steps.purpose: Specify which robot the system should remove.
steps.instruction: In the Remove Robot section, enter the corresponding robot ID or select the robot.
steps.expected_result: The intended robot is identified in the Remove Robot section.
steps.healthy_condition: The correct robot ID is entered or the correct robot is selected.
steps.failure_condition: The robot cannot be identified, selected, or entered correctly.

actions.label: Enter robot ID or select robot
actions.exact_action: Enter the corresponding robot Id or select the robot.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Remove Robot instructions showing that removal can be done by entering the corresponding robot ID or selecting the robot.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the correct robot cannot be identified for removal.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text for Remove Robot states: "1. Enter the corresponding robot Id or select the robot."
OCR text states: "Enter the corresponding robot ID" and for removal "Enter the corresponding robot Id or select the robot."

steps.title: Click Remove
steps.purpose: Submit the remove action for the selected or entered robot.
steps.expected_result: The system processes the remove request.
steps.healthy_condition: The remove action is accepted by the interface.
steps.failure_condition: The remove action cannot be submitted or does not appear to process.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Remove Robot workflow on the slide, including the Remove action.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the Remove action cannot be performed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text for Remove Robot states: "2. Click 'Remove'"

steps.title: Verify removal success
steps.purpose: Confirm the system reports that the robot removal completed successfully.
steps.instruction: Verify that the system shows that the removal was successful.
steps.expected_result: The system shows that the removal was successful.
steps.healthy_condition: A success indication for the remove action is shown by the system.
steps.failure_condition: The system does not show that the removal was successful.

actions.label: Confirm success indication
actions.exact_action: Verify that the system shows that the removal was successful.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The slide text stating that the system will show that the removal was successful.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the system does not show that the removal was successful.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text for Remove Robot states: "3. The system will show that the removal was successful."
OCR text states the system will show that adding was successful and that removal was successful.

success_criteria: The intended robot is removed using the Robot Selection Add and Remove screen.
The system shows that the removal was successful.
healthy_conditions: The Robot Selection Add and Remove screen is available.
The correct robot ID can be entered or the correct robot can be selected.
The Remove action can be submitted.
The system displays a success indication for the removal.
failure_conditions: The Robot Selection Add and Remove screen is not available.
The correct robot cannot be entered or selected.
The Remove action cannot be completed.
The system does not show that the removal was successful.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the system does not show that the removal was successful.
Escalate if the screen or remove action is unavailable, because the source provides no additional recovery steps.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Robot Selection Add and Remove slide showing the remove workflow and success confirmation.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: OCR text for Remove Robot states: "1. Enter the corresponding robot Id or select the robot. 2. Click 'Remove' 3. The system will show that the removal was successful."

missing_details: The source does not define specific conditions for when a robot should be removed.
The source does not identify any supporting roles or approval requirements.
The source does not provide troubleshooting steps if removal fails.
The source does not specify the exact appearance or wording of the success indication.
The source does not provide time estimates, production stop requirements, or LOTO requirements.
